metadata.description: Seq MCP server with a seq-ops investigation skill for Claude Code. Provides structured log analysis, incident investigation, and health checks against a Seq logging server. Log responses are redacted of Norwegian personal data (PII — fødselsnummer, person names, phone numbers, emails) by default for GDPR/Personvern compliance. Originally created by Ahmad Atighechi (@ahmad2x4).

plugins.name: seq-ops
plugins.description: Expert Seq log analysis skill — incident investigation, health checks, error pattern detection, and post-deployment monitoring. Requires the mcp-server-seq MCP server.
